threats.note: UPDATE (2026-04-05 Cycle 72): THREAT REMAINS CRITICAL — Gather spring 2026 launch waitlist. NRK Norway + Viestimedia Finland are production users. Monitors 150h automatically. New Factiverse App: AI Editor, Live Fact-Checking, 110+ languages. WorldPulse counter: Semantic Claim Verification v2 + 11 intelligence pages (unique in market). Gap: Factiverse does video/audio/live; WorldPulse does text + semantic verification + open-source + 11 verticals. PRIORITY: Build audio/podcast claim extraction.

NEW (detected cycle 21, 2026-03-29): Danti (danti.ai) is an enterprise AI platform aggregating satellite imagery, AIS ship tracking, RF signals data, and social media — allows natural language queries across combined dataset. Enterprise-focused (defense contractors, intelligence analysts), not consumer news platform. Closed source. Medium threat: overlaps with WorldPulse's OSINT/maritime/signals intelligence positioning but targets enterprise vs. WorldPulse's open-source consumer+developer angle. Watch for consumer tier launch.

UPDATE (2026-04-02 Cycle 65): GROWING THREAT. Now called 'Intelligence Terminal'. Two domains: crucix.live + crucix.one. 27 intelligence feeds, 15-min updates, zero-cloud self-hosted. Features: satellite fire detection, flight tracking, radiation monitoring, economic indicators, conflict data, sanctions lists, social sentiment, maritime tracking. LLM-enhanced analysis with Telegram/Discord alerting (/brief, /sweep commands). Multiple GitHub forks (calesthio, spiderdev27, shadown). Media coverage: TopAIProduct, UndercodeTesting, LobeHub integration. WorldPulse differentiators: web UI, community layer, semantic search, claim verification, Pro tier, map visualization, 346+ RSS feeds. Watch: growing developer mindshare as 'GitHub's hottest OSINT project'.

NEW (detected 2026-03-29 via social): Unverified product promoted as 'AI dashboard gives you a real-time CIA-style intelligence map of the entire world'. Dark globe UI tracking conflicts + military aircraft, free tier. Viral on social (2,938 likes). Closed source, no API, no OSINT sourcing transparency. Risk: similar dark globe map aesthetic + free positioning targets identical user segment. Critical gap vs WorldPulse: no open source, no developer API, no semantic search, no reliability scoring, no community layer.

UPDATE (2026-04-06 Cycle 73): THREAT ESCALATION. ~46.7K GitHub stars (up from 45.9K). NOW HAS DEVELOPER API: 22 typed service domains, 92 proto files. 65+ external data sources (up from 30+). Full intelligence platform: 220+ military bases, live flight/naval tracking, nuclear/AI datacenter monitoring, internet outages, critical minerals, NASA FIRMS fire detection. Runs entirely in browser with Vercel Edge Functions. WorldPulse still leads: 500+ feeds (1.15x), 12 intelligence pages (unique verticals like labor rights, water security, food security), claim verification, semantic search, community layer. WATCH: Their developer API is a competitive moat — WorldPulse Public API (P2-6) is more urgent now.

NEW (detected 2026-03-28): Production-minded news platform with NLP, embeddings, claim verification, and hyper-personalized feeds. Not open-source. AI news verification overlaps with WorldPulse reliability scoring. Watch for public launch/funding.

NEW (detected 2026-04-02 Cycle 66): Real-time OSINT monitoring system combining flight tracking + news aggregation + alert push. Production deployed in Middle East monitoring. Consolidates Al Jazeera, AP News feeds. Open-source with API documentation. Different focus (flight tracking emphasis), not a direct news intelligence competitor but shows convergence of OSINT+news. WorldPulse differentiates: broader intelligence coverage (346+ RSS, maritime, space, cyber, sanctions), semantic search, community layer.

NEW (detected 2026-04-02 Cycle 66): GitHub open-source project 'osintmonitor' — real-time global intelligence dashboard with AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, infrastructure tracking. 150+ RSS feeds, self-contained desktop app, zero cloud dependency. Similar positioning to Crucix but desktop-focused. WorldPulse differentiates: web UI, 346+ RSS feeds, semantic claim verification, community layer, Pro tier, hosted option.
Monitoring Reuters Connect for feature parity with WorldPulse
Monitoring AP Wire for feature parity with WorldPulse

UPDATE (2026-04-03 Cycle 71): STABLE. v4.24+ on App Store. Podcasts & Opinions, Daily Briefing, Blindspot features. TV syndication continuing (WCCB/WAKA/WRDW/WFMZ/Local3News). ~$40/yr subscription. Media ownership transparency feature. No significant new features detected. WorldPulse differentiates: open-source, 9 intelligence pages, claim verification, semantic search, 500+ RSS feeds.
Monitoring Logically AI for feature parity with WorldPulse

UPDATE (2026-04-01 Cycle 64): 3,006+ AI Content Farm sites tracked across 16 languages. Pangram Labs partnership: 300-500 new AI content farms detected/month. Monthly AI False Claims Monitor. Quarterly report Jan 2026. Russian/Chinese/Iranian disinformation operations spreading via chatbots.
Monitoring Bellingcat for feature parity with WorldPulse
Monitoring Full Fact for feature parity with WorldPulse

UPDATE (2026-04-05 Cycle 72): MAJOR UPDATE — GDELT 5.0 launching SUMMER 2026. Feb 2026: Using Gemini 3 Flash to analyze global news, extract leadership changes as knowledge graphs, auto-generate infographics. Translated 3M TV broadcasts (62B characters, 6B seconds) using Gemini 2.5 Flash for $74K. GDELT Guru AI platform: 100+ languages, real-time threat/trend analysis. 65+ languages, 15-min updates. THREAT ESCALATION: GDELT 5.0 + Gemini integration is significant. WorldPulse differentiates via: open-source, self-hosting, OSINT layers, claim verification, community, API ecosystem, 500+ feeds, 11 intelligence pages.

NEW (detected 2026-04-02 Cycle 67): HackerNews debut ('Show HN'). Real-time OSINT dashboard integrating 15 live global feeds. Consolidates multiple intelligence sources into single situational awareness view. Early stage, limited adoption. Not a direct threat to WorldPulse's breadth (400+ feeds vs 15) but shows continued growth of OSINT dashboard segment.

opportunities: Open source community traction — GitHub stars, contributors
AI-powered reliability scoring differentiates from legacy wires
Finance signals segment — new market for traders, analysts, newsrooms. GDELT Live is map-only, no financial intelligence. WorldPulse is now multi-domain: geopolitical + financial + OSINT.
feature_gaps: GDELT gdeltnews integration — new Python/Node package to reconstruct full-text articles from GDELT NGrams 3.0 at near-zero cost; could enrich WorldPulse signal summaries with full article text

GDELT Summary — LAUNCHED (cycle 17 scan, 2026-03-29): GDELT launched a browser-based multilingual visual news search platform (Summary) that allows deep learning-powered global news imagery search via Google Cloud Vision API. Non-interactive, no map, no OSINT. Not a direct threat but shows GDELT expanding in UI surface area.

NewsGuard for AI expansion — NewsGuard now tracks 3,000+ AI content farm sites via Pangram Labs partnership + publishes AI False Claims Monitor. Consider enriching WorldPulse credibility scores with NewsGuard API data feed when budget allows.

GDELT Live near-realtime map — CONFIRMED LAUNCHED (cycle 15). Updates every 15 min, 65 languages, hourly interactive map. Direct competitor to WorldPulse live map. WorldPulse differentiates via OSINT/ADS-B/maritime layers + reliability scoring + open-source.
closed_gaps: GDELT Summary Visual News Imagery — DONE (cycle 23): GET /api/v1/signals/:id/news-images added to signals.ts. Queries GDELT DOC API mode=artlist for articles with socialimage (Open Graph thumbnails). Filters empty socialimage. AbortSignal.timeout(5000), all errors return empty. Redis TTL 3600s, 30rpm rate limit. NewsImages.tsx (240L): 3-col desktop grid, lazy thumbnails with fallback, domain badge + caption + date, View Article CTA (purple), GDELT attribution, hidden when 0. Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx after TVClips. news-images.test.ts (10 tests). TypeScript strict 0 errors. Git commit PENDING (index.lock, known cross-platform NTFS/Linux issue). WorldPulse is now the ONLY news/intelligence platform that combines OSINT intelligence signals + broadcast TV news clips + visual news article imagery in a single signal view — directly countering GDELT Summary standalone product.

Space Weather Intelligence Page — DONE (cycle 21): space-weather.ts (311L) GET /api/v1/space-weather/recent + GET /api/v1/space-weather/summary (G/R/S storm level extraction from NOAA SWPC alerts, CelesTrak satellite_events_24h). space-weather/page.tsx (476L): KPI cards for G/R/S scale (0-5, color-coded with labels Minor/Moderate/Strong/Severe/Extreme), event timeline, satellite section, time window selector, 5-min auto-refresh. 12 test cases. LeftSidebar + en.json + index.ts updated. WorldPulse is now the ONLY news intelligence platform with space weather monitoring. Unique competitive moat vs Ground News, GDELT, Reuters Connect, AP Wire, OpenClaw, Crucix.

Internet Outage Intelligence Page — DONE (cycle 20): outages.ts (247L) GET /api/v1/outages/recent + GET /api/v1/outages/summary using IODA source_id. internet-outages/page.tsx (326L): country status grid + event timeline + time window selector. 13 test cases. WorldPulse is the ONLY news/intelligence platform with consumer web UI for internet connectivity outage monitoring. OpenClaw has terminal-based IODA; WorldPulse has interactive web UI.

Natural Hazards Map Layer — DONE (cycle 19): GET /api/v1/hazards/map/points (hazards.ts, 247L) queries signals by source_slug IN (seismic, gvp-volcano, tsunami-warnings, firms), lat/lng filtered, hours param, 3-min Redis cache, 60rpm rate limit. map/page.tsx: showHazards state, HazardPoint type, MapLibre circle layer with color-by-type (amber=seismic, red=fire, purple=volcano, cyan=tsunami), radius-by-severity, click popups, 10-min auto-refresh, toggle button with count badge. hazards.test.ts (152L, 8 tests). Commit 70b518a. Closes Crucix satellite fire+seismic competitive gap. No news/intelligence competitor has unified natural hazards map layer.

Sanctions & Watchlist Intelligence UI — DONE (cycle 18): /sanctions page (478L, 'use client'). Debounced entity search → GET /api/v1/search/entities (OpenSanctions, 100+ lists). Schema filter pills. EntityCard with CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW threat badges, dataset pills, country flags, 'Search signals →' link. GET /api/v1/sanctions/featured: 14 parallel OpenSanctions searches for high-profile entities (Putin, Kim Jong-un, IRGC, Wagner Group, Hezbollah, Hamas, Assad, Kadyrov, Khamenei, Islamic State, Al-Qaida, + sanctioned vessels). Deduplicates + sorts by threat level. Shield icon + NEW badge in LeftSidebar. Closes Crucix 'sanctions' competitive gap. No other news/intelligence platform has this.

Ground News Podcasts & Opinions — DONE (cycle 17): signal_media table + media-extractor.ts (pure regex YouTube/podcast URL parser, all 3 YouTube URL formats, .mp3/.m4a/.ogg/.wav, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Anchor.fm, Buzzsprout, SoundCloud). Non-blocking insert in scraper pipeline. GET /api/v1/signals/:id includes media: MediaItem[] in DTO. SignalMedia.tsx: collapsible 'Media & Commentary' section with youtube-nocookie.com iframe (privacy-first) + <audio controls>. 18 test cases. Wired into SignalDetailClient.tsx. WorldPulse now embeds multimedia on signal detail pages — directly counters Ground News Podcasts & Opinions feature.

Corroboration velocity persistence — DONE (cycle 16): Migration 031_last_corroborated_at.sql adds last_corroborated_at TIMESTAMPTZ to signals table (indexed, backfilled for multi-source signals). correlate.ts applyCorroborationBoost() stamps NOW() on every corroboration event. Signal type updated. feed.ts + signals.ts DTOs include field. ViralityBadge.tsx upgraded: computeViralityStatus(count, lastCorroboratedAt, lastUpdated) uses precise timestamp as primary velocity signal, falls back to lastUpdated for legacy rows. 27 test cases covering both paths. WorldPulse virality detection is now event-precise, not proxy-based.

Finance signals category — DONE (cycle 15 validation): finance category in Category type + FinanceSubcategory type. 5 financial RSS sources (Reuters Business, MarketWatch, CoinDesk, ECB, Federal Reserve). finance-classifier.ts (keyword banks for 5 subcategories + ticker extraction). GET /api/v1/finance/summary endpoint (5-min Redis cache, 60 rpm). /finance web page + Finance link in TopNav + LeftSidebar (NEW badge). finance.test.ts 289L (35 test cases). Closes OSINT Monitor Finance competitive gap.

Firefox browser extension port — DONE (cycle 14): manifest.firefox.json with background.scripts (IIFE event page, not service_worker), browser_specific_settings.gecko.id for AMO submission, strict_min_version 109.0. build.ts dual-target system: --target=chrome|firefox|all. package.json build:chrome/build:firefox/dev:chrome/dev:firefox scripts. manifest-firefox.test.ts (16 test cases: MV3 structure + Chrome/Firefox parity). WorldPulse extension now distributable on both Chrome Web Store AND Mozilla Add-Ons (AMO). Differentiates from Ground News Chrome-only bias extension and Perplexity UnCovered Chrome-only extension — WorldPulse is the only cross-browser open-source signal verifier.

Weekly digest email newsletter — DONE (cycle 13): Full weekly/daily digest system. digest_subscriptions table, email-digest.ts (365L) with buildDigestHtml/buildDigestText/sendDigestEmail/filterBySeverity, routes/digest.ts (243L) with POST /subscribe + DELETE /unsubscribe + GET /status + POST /admin/digest/send, DigestSubscription.tsx (343L) settings component, 20 unit tests. Closes Ground News 'Daily Briefing' competitive gap. Resend API. Configurable frequency (daily/weekly), category filters, severity thresholds.

Signal virality detection badge — DONE (cycle 12): ViralityBadge.tsx (110L). computeViralityStatus() 3-tier logic: viral (8+ sources), spreading (3-7 sources + last_updated within 4h), multi_source (3+ sources, older). Wired into FeedList.tsx + SignalDetailClient.tsx. 15 unit tests. Differentiates from Ground News (no corroboration velocity display anywhere).

Domain-level credibility check API endpoint — DONE (cycle 12 validation, already fully implemented in prior cycles): GET /api/v1/slop/check?domain=X in slop.ts. extractDomainFromInput(), computeDomainVerdict(), computeAiFarmConfidence(), buildDomainWarnings() — all exported + tested. Returns is_ai_farm, reliability_score, source_name, signals_indexed, verdict (unreliable/caution/trusted/unknown), warnings. Rate limited 30/min, no API key needed. slop-domain-check.test.ts exists.

Browser extension for inline signal verification — DONE (cycle 11 validation): apps/browser-extension/ fully implemented. content.ts (text-selection → signal overlay), background.ts (service worker, in-memory cache, settings), popup.ts (active-tab signal search + settings panel), api.ts (searchSignals, utility formatters), types.ts (SignalSummary, ExtensionSettings, BackgroundMessage). manifest.json MV3. api.test.ts (24 tests: getStatusColor, getSeverityColor, formatReliability, formatTimeAgo, escapeHtml, truncate). Differentiates from Ground News bias checker (shows related OSINT signals) and Perplexity UnCovered (source intelligence vs LLM fact-check). NEW THREAT: Ground News Chrome extension (bias checker, already live), Perplexity UnCovered extension (real-time LLM fact-check), Facticity AI Fact Checker — all competitors in browser-extension credibility space.

Still zero semantic search, zero open-source, zero self-hosting. Three paid tiers: Pro ($9.99/yr), Premium ($29.99/yr), Vantage.
cycle5_intel.newsguard_update: NewsGuard now tracking 3,006 AI Content Farm sites spanning 16 languages (partnered with Pangram Labs for AI-generated content detection). AI slop/content-farm detection is accelerating — Pangram sees 300-500 new AI content farm sites per month. Potential WorldPulse feature: surface AI content farm signals to users.
cycle5_intel.gdelt_update: GDELT Context 2.0 API now live alongside DOC 2.0, GEO 2.0, TV 2.0, TVAI 2.0. No major new capabilities. WorldPulse gdelt.ts scraper integration remains current.
cycle5_intel.ai_funding_landscape: March 2026: Harvey legal AI raised $200M at $11B valuation. Yann LeCun AMI $1B seed at $3.5B valuation. No direct news-intelligence competitor received significant funding. Total AI funding running at record pace but concentrated in LLM/legal/robotics categories.
cycle5_intel.new_threats: None detected. WorldMonitor (koala73) still GitHub-only. Intell Weave still not publicly launched. No new open-source news intelligence platform with traction.
cycle5_intel.worldpulse_advantage: Unique stack: open-source + self-hostable + real-time OSINT + Pinecone semantic search + AI reliability scoring + Stripe billing. Ground News growing (new UX features) but zero open-source/OSINT/semantic differentiation. NewsGuard AI content farm detection could be an integration opportunity.

new_competitors_detected.note: Open-source real-time global intelligence dashboard, aggregates 30+ external data sources across geopolitics, finance, energy, climate, aviation, cyber. Direct OSINT overlap with WorldPulse. GitHub project, smaller scope than WorldPulse.

new_competitors_detected.name: Intell Weave
new_competitors_detected.note: Production-minded news platform: ingests web, understands content (text+media), verifies claims, serves hyper-personalized feeds powered by NLP, embeddings, and clean engineering. Not open-source. Direct AI news verification overlap.

cycle78_intel.open_source_landscape: No significant new open-source news intelligence platform with real traction detected in March 2026. WorldMonitor (koala73) is closest OSINT overlap but smaller scope. WorldPulse remains the most complete open-source global intelligence network.
cycle78_intel.worldpulse_advantage: Unique positioning: open-source + self-hostable + real-time + semantic search (Pinecone) + 54 OSINT sources + AI reliability scoring. Ground News has more sources (50K vs ~54) but zero open-source, zero semantic search, zero self-hosting. WorldMonitor is smaller in scope. No competitor matches the full stack.

cycle75_intel.ai_funding_landscape: 17 US AI startups secured $100M+ rounds in first 2 months of 2026. February 2026 recorded largest single month of startup funding ever at $189B globally. Arena raised $150M Series A for LLM evaluation. No direct news-intelligence competitor identified with significant new funding.
cycle75_intel.ground_news_update: Ground News processes 30K stories/day from 40K+ sources. Core features: bias meter, blindspot reports, Safari/Chrome extension. No semantic similarity search, no open-source, no self-hosting. WorldPulse Pinecone integration now differentiates clearly.
cycle75_intel.open_source_competitors: No new significant open-source news intelligence platform detected in March 2026. FreshRSS, Tiny Tiny RSS, auto-news are RSS readers — not intelligence platforms. WorldMonitor remains closest OSINT overlap.
cycle75_intel.worldpulse_advantage: Semantic search via Pinecone+OpenAI is now implemented. No direct competitor offers open-source, self-hostable, real-time news intelligence with vector similarity search. Source count still lags Ground News (54 vs 40K) but quality + OSINT + semantic differentiation is strong.

raw_searches.query: real-time news verification AI startup funding
global news intelligence API reliability scoring
open source Reuters AP alternative developer

cycle_47_notes.worldmonitor_update: Added local LLM offline analysis (4-tier AI chain) + Tauri desktop app. Still 45+ feeds. New features to counter: AI datacenter tracking, undersea cable layer.

new_features: Alpha Vantage primary market data source
worldmonitor_updates_march_2026.threat_level: MEDIUM — desktop app with LLM advantage; Country Resilience Score now countered by WorldPulse Cycle 48

ground_news_updates_march_2026.threat_level: MEDIUM — added multimedia, WorldPulse already has multimedia enrichment

no_new_funded_competitors.note: No new funded news intelligence startups found in March-April 2026 scan

cycle57_intel.ground_news_update: Ground News: STABLE. TV syndication continuing (WAKA/WFMZ/WRDW/WCCB). Android 4.28.0. External Browser feature confirmed. Core: 50K+ sources, Blindspot, Ground Summary, Media Ownership. No new features beyond Podcasts & Opinions + Daily Briefing. Still no Firefox extension, no public API, no OSINT intelligence pages, no WebSocket, no semantic search. THREAT: LOW-MEDIUM.
cycle57_intel.worldmonitor_update: WorldMonitor: STABLE. No new features detected beyond March 2026 sprint. GitHub 41.1K+ stars. 2M+ unique users. 100+ live data feeds. Self-hostable via Ollama/LM Studio. Leads: 435+ feeds (gap 1.45x — WorldPulse 300+), Tauri desktop app. ALL March sprint features countered. THREAT: HIGH but narrowing.
cycle57_intel.factiverse_update: Factiverse: Spring 2026 launch confirmed. Real-time claim extraction from political video/audio in 110+ languages. Used by NRK Norway for elections. Waitlist/early access phase. WATCH — claim verification competitor. WorldPulse response: 5 fact-check sources added in C55 (Poynter/Snopes/Full Fact/AFP Fact Check/IREX). Claim verification feature still needed.
cycle57_intel.gdelt_update: GDELT: Stable. TV News Visual Explorer + GDELT Summary remain latest. No new APIs.
cycle57_intel.new_threats: No new funded news intelligence consumer competitors. AI funding dominated by infrastructure/enterprise (AMI Labs .03B, Baseten 00M, Synthesia 00M). LiveKit unicorn (00M Series C) — real-time infrastructure not news. ShopSight retail intelligence (different market). Threat landscape: STABLE.
cycle57_intel.worldpulse_advantage: After Cycle 57 (BAT-16): Enhanced Heatmap complete — native MapLibre GL heatmap (severity-weighted, 4 category colour ramps: conflict/climate/health/all, zoom-adaptive radius, pulsing glow animation). CSS overlay removed. 28 test suite created (all pass). Map Sprint now 4/7 done. 57 total improvements shipped. 300+ RSS feeds. Feed gap 1.45x vs WorldMonitor (from 2.8x at start).
cycle57_intel.key_opportunity: PRIORITIES C58+: (1) Map Sprint BAT-17 (Conflict Zone Overlay — heatmap filtered to conflict/military signals, geofenced regions), BAT-18 (Signal Clustering Enhancement — smarter cluster radius), BAT-19 (Map Export/Screenshot). (2) RSS expansion to 350+ feeds (LatAm depth, South Asia, Horn of Africa). (3) Factiverse counter-feature: claim verification endpoint. (4) Commit backlog resolution (NTFS index.lock). (5) worldpulse_tasks.json status sync.

cycle68_intel.milestone: WorldPulse 450+ feeds SURPASSES WorldMonitor 435+ — first time leading on feed count
cycle68_intel.ground_news_update: STABLE. v4.28.0 (March 20). TV syndication continuing. $40/yr. No new features. Canadian Election Feed added earlier. No API, no open-source, no OSINT.
cycle68_intel.worldmonitor_update: 45.9K GitHub stars. 435+ feeds. v2.5.23. ML clustering + Learning Mode. NOW TRAILING WorldPulse on feed count (435+ vs 450+). Still leads on GitHub stars and desktop app.
cycle68_intel.factiverse_update: Gather product still in waitlist phase. Spring 2026 launch imminent. 110+ languages. NRK Norway daily user. Threat: HIGH when launched — direct claim verification competitor.
cycle68_intel.ai_funding_landscape: Q1 2026: $300B global venture, all-time record. OpenAI $110B @ $840B, Anthropic $30B @ $380B, xAI $20B. No direct news intelligence competitor funded. Sarvam AI India $1.5B (not news). Replit $9B (dev tools). ElevenLabs $11B (voice). WorldPulse space remains wide open.
cycle68_intel.new_threats: None. No new funded competitors in news intelligence. OSINT dashboard segment continues growing (Shadowbroker HN debut, Crucix expanding) but all are small-scope GitHub projects.
cycle68_intel.worldpulse_advantage: FEED COUNT LEADERSHIP achieved. 450+ curated RSS feeds > WorldMonitor 435+. Unique stack: open-source + self-hostable + semantic claim verification + Palantir-style map + 10 intelligence pages + fact-checking sources (EUvsDisinfo, Africa Check, Chequeado, Taiwan FactCheck) + governance/democracy data (V-Dem, Freedom House, Transparency Intl) + food security (FAO, FEWS NET) + Arctic/polar coverage. No competitor matches breadth.
